page: Microsoft Azure F4ams_v6 is an x86_64 architecture server belonging to the Famsv6 family. It features 4 dedicated physical cores powered by an AMD EPYC 9V74 processor running at 3.7 GHz. The system is configured with 32.0 GB of system memory, yielding a high memory-to-vCPU ratio of 8.0 GB per core. It does not include local storage or bundled GPUs, though it is premium storage capable. Virtualization is managed via the Microsoft Hyper-V hypervisor.

Benchmark data reveals strong single-core performance, with stress-ng single-core CPU tests placing in the top 10% and Geekbench single-core scores in the top 25%. Multi-core performance, including stress-ng multi-core and Geekbench multi-core, falls within the average range. Memory bandwidth tests, such as read-only large block at 38.92 GB/sec and write large block at 28.0 GB/sec, also demonstrate average tier performance. For specialized tasks, single-threaded bzip3 decompression and Geekbench text processing register in the top 25%, while LLM inference with a 7B model shows a tradeoff, dropping to the bottom 25% for prompt processing but maintaining average speeds for text generation.

Given its dedicated CPU allocation and high memory density of 8.0 GB per core, this server offers a balanced cost-to-resource profile for memory-intensive workloads that do not require local storage. The absence of bundled local NVMe storage and GPUs limits its use in heavy data-science or local storage-heavy database roles. However, its strong single-core execution and 32.0 GB RAM capacity make it suitable for memory-intensive applications, text processing, caching layers, and general-purpose workloads requiring dedicated CPU execution without hyperthreading.

Multi-core performance, memory bandwidth, and database operations fall within the average range. The high memory-to-vCPU ratio makes this server qualitatively cost-efficient for memory-intensive applications that do not require local NVMe storage. It is suited for memory-intensive workloads, text processing, caching, and applications benefiting from dedicated single-thread execution.
og_description: Microsoft Azure F4ams_v6 is a memory-intensive server featuring 4 dedicated AMD EPYC cores at 3.7 GHz, 32 GB RAM, and no local storage, delivering strong single-core performance for memory-heavy workloads.

tagline: A memory-intensive virtual machine featuring dedicated AMD EPYC cores and high memory density for single-thread and memory-heavy workloads.
